# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent kong no auth.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: kong_no_auth

# kong.yml

services:
  - name: my-service
    host: my-service-host
    port: 80
    protocol: http

routes:
  - name: my-route
    paths:
      - /my-path
    service: my-service
    upstream:
      target: my-service-host:80
      hash_fallback: true
      loadbalancer:
        algorithm: round-robin
        persistence_timeout: 30s

consumers:
  - username: kong-admin
    id: 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
    custom_id: my-consumer-id

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_in_header: x-kong-key

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      upstream:
        target: my-service-host:80
      rate:
        calls: 1000
        period: 60s

plugins:
  - name: ip-restriction
    enabled: true
    config:
      allowed_ips:
        - 192.168.1.1/32
        - 10.0.0.1/32

certificates:
  - name: my-certificate
    certificate: |
      -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
      MIIE...
      -----END CERTIFICATE-----

  - name: my-private-key
    private_key: |
      -----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
      MIIE...
      -----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----

plugins:
  - name: kong-management-api
    enabled: true

kong:
  database:
    type: postgres
    host: localhost
    port: 5432
    username: kong
    password: mysecretpassword
